caribbean.headline: Small Craft Advisory Issued for Turks and Caicos Waters
caribbean.paragraph: Turks and Caicos is experiencing sustained winds of 21 knots with wave heights reaching 8.1 feet and a dominant northerly swell period of 9 seconds, prompting a Small Craft Advisory for mariners. Rain chances peak at 50 percent, while nearby Nassau sees slightly stronger winds up to 22 knots but lower wave heights.

mediterranean.headline: Heavy Rain and Moderate Seas Impact Athens Today
mediterranean.paragraph: Athens (Piraeus) is experiencing heavy rain with a 98 percent chance of precipitation, accompanied by moderate southwest swell generating wave heights up to 4.5 feet and wind speeds reaching 11 knots. Dubrovnik is seeing slightly stronger winds near 16 knots but lower wave heights, maintaining generally manageable marine conditions across the central Mediterranean.
